text:
Hishita (ヒシタ, Hishita) was a male butler of the Zoldyck Family. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 5, Chapter 43 

Appearance

Hishita had short, light blond and black eyes. He wore a Zoldyck butler uniform of a black formal suit.

Personality

Hishita seemed to be a loyal butler of the Zoldyck Family, as he was seen following Gotoh's orders and is present when Gotoh and the other butlers welcomed Gon and his friends into the manor.

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

When Gon, Kurapika, and Leorio come to Kukuroo Mountain to free Killua from the control of his family, Hishita, along with the other butlers, meets them at the butlers' mansion. They then play a guessing game with the uninvited guests in which Canary's life is at stake. During the game's final round, Gon correctly guesses that Hishita has the coin. 

13 th Hunter Chairman Election arc

Killua contacts Canary to have her get Hishita to send cars to three locations he specified, including one near the hospital where Gon is recuperating. Hishita waits for Killua and Alluka at the designated location and is told to drive to the hospital 60 kilometers away. When Illumi's Needle People confront Hishita, Killua, and Alluka, Killua orders Hishita to get them out of there. On the other hand, Hishita refuses, that is, unless Master Illumi orders it, revealing himself as being under Illumi's control as well. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 31, Chapter 329 

Killua briefly mentions Hishita as one viable option to escape Illumi's grasp by removing him from the car. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 31, Chapter 330 

Abilities & Powers

As a butler of the Zoldyck Family, Hishita was in constant training. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 5, Chapter 40 He could also open the Testing Gates, since according to Zebro, opening the gates is the bare minimum. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 5, Chapter 39 although the number of doors he could open is unknown.

Nen

Hishita likely knew how to use Nen because of his position as a Zoldyck Family butler.
